name: Snowflake Arctic
archDisplay: Dense-MoE Hybrid (10B dense transformer + 128x3.66B residual MoE experts, top-2 gating)
note: Apache-2.0 480B-total/17B-active dense+MoE hybrid (128 experts) tuned for enterprise SQL/code/instruction-following, trained for under $2M.
tpsNote: 480B total parameters (Q4 ~291GB) require a multi-GPU server; not runnable on a single consumer GPU, and mainline llama.cpp needs a community fork for Arctic's architecture.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real via Snowflake's official blog (fetched directly): 480B total / 17B active dense+MoE hybrid (10B dense + 128x3.66B experts, top-2 gating), Apache-2.0, released 2024-04-24, trained for under $2M. Context length of 4K confirmed directly from the HF config.json max_position_embeddings=4096 field. All 4 result rows (MMLU 67.3, GSM8k 74.2, HumanEval 64.3, IFEval 52.4) literally confirmed present on the cited Flexera blog page. No changes needed.
